chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Revision Application No.S- 06 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 21.11.2025. Ms. Safa Hisbani, A.P.G for State. = None present for applicant. Mr. Ishrat Ali Lohar, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.5, taken on record. To come up on 15.12.2025. LATE DIARY After passing the above orders, the applicant appeared in person alongwith his learned counsel Mr. Intizar Ali Dahri and submits that he no longer wishes to press this Criminal Revision Application and would like to withdraw the same. Request granted. The Criminal Revision Application is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE Tufail
